notes: Core mechanics present but maze layout is incomplete (only 26 rows vs 31 expected), ghost AI has bugs with home/exit logic causing erratic behavior, and pac-man collision/movement feels imprecise due to the pixel-based approach mixing poorly with tile snapping.

A recognizable and mostly working Pac-Man clone, but the maze/layout is incomplete, several mechanics are approximate rather than authentic, and overall polish/game feel fall short of a strong benchmark build.
